description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular, single-story structure with a modern, flat roof and a muted gray exterior. The facade is punctuated by several symmetrically arranged windows and a central entrance, giving it a balanced and inviting appearance. The roof appears to have a slight overhang, and the building is surrounded by a small assortment of outdoor elements, including a tree, a shrub, a patio set, and a cylindrical water tank. The windows are white-framed, and the walls are clad in a light gray material, likely concrete or brick. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor space. The surrounding objects suggest a suburban or urban residential context, with landscaping and utility features integrated into the property.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, gray exterior, and symmetrical white-framed windows, surrounded by landscaping and utility elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and a clear view of the flat roof and facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, side windows, and adjacent landscaping elements.
description_view_2: Rear view with a focus on the backyard area, patio set, and additional outdoor features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's length, side windows, and utility structures.
